steps.title: Use the symmetry shortcut
steps.content: The equation $|x-8|=16$ has solutions $16$ units away from $8$: $$x=8+16=24 \quad \text{and} \quad x=8-16=-8.$$

steps.title: Sum the solutions
steps.content: $$24+(-8)=16.$$ Shortcut: the solutions are centered at $8$, so their sum is $2(8)=16$. The answer is 16.
